# fptcloud_floating_ip (Resource)

Provides a FPT cloud floating ip which can be created to public ip address in order to provide expanded floating ip.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fptcloud_floating_ip" "example" {
  vpc_id    = "your_vpc_id"
}
```

## Import

Import format: `vpc_id/floating_ip_id`. Use `fptcloud_vpc` for `vpc_id` and `fptcloud_floating_ip` (with filter by id or ip_address) for the floating IP `id`, then use a separate resource and an `import` block.

**Example: import an existing floating IP**

```terraform
data "fptcloud_vpc" "main" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

data "fptcloud_floating_ip" "imported" {
  vpc_id = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  filter {
    key    = "ip_address"
    values = ["floating-ip"]
  }
}

import {
  to = fptcloud_floating_ip.imported_fip
  id = "${data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id}/${element(data.fptcloud_floating_ip.imported.floating_ips, 0).id}"
}

resource "fptcloud_floating_ip" "imported_fip" {
  vpc_id  = data.fptcloud_vpc.main.id
  tag_ids = toset(element(data.fptcloud_floating_ip.imported.floating_ips, 0).tag_ids)
}
```

Run `terraform plan` to perform the import. After a successful import, remove the `import` block. CLI alternative: `terraform import fptcloud_floating_ip.imported_fip "<vpc_id>/<floating_ip_id>"`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `vpc_id` (String) The vpc id of the floating ip

### Optional

- `tag_ids` (Set of String) List of tag IDs to associate with the floating ip

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip_address` (String)
